pages.text:
Open a Support Case
Open a technical, product-specific case with Technical Support.
Attach data files, specify severity level, and provide details about the product
and issue.
Sign In
Username (Email Address) *
Email Address
Continue
Create a new account
(https://support.ptc.com/appserver/common/account/createAccount.jsp)
Related Resources
Search the Knowledge Base (/support/knowledge-base) to get help from
Technical Support articles, product documentation, and community
discussions.
Learn how to open a case with a department other than Technical Support
(https://www.ptc.com/en/support/csguide/Contact/Contact_by_Web). For
example, use the Customer Care Case Logger for license management,

How Technical Support Cases Work
(/support/enablement/Managing%20your%20Technical%20Support%20Cases/)
explains the tools and processes to open and manage a case with Technical
Support.
View the status of a Technical Support case that you or others at your
company have opened at Manage Support Cases (/support/case-tracker).
If you would like to purchase or renew a support subscription, please contact
Global Support Sales (
https://support.ptc.com/appserver/wcms/standards/free.jsp?
&im_dbkey=84069&icg_dbkey=841).
